architectReview.evidence: Leader audit confirms G004 wires the public dashboard, snapshot-based CSV/XLSX export, and run documentation on top of the approved national-average-only data contract. Export routes read from the shared snapshot-backed dataset builder, dashboard rendering handles unavailable DB states honestly, and README matches the implemented commands and routes.

executorQa.evidence: Full-repo typecheck/build passed, and a live embedded-Postgres verifier booted the standalone app, captured a dashboard screenshot, and exercised both export routes against seeded snapshot-backed data.
e2eCommands: node --import tsx --input-type=module embedded-postgres live web verifier
redTeamCommands: Embedded verifier seeds only snapshot-backed data and verifies the app/export behavior without fabricating dashboard rows.
CSV route check confirms snapshot and forecast sections exist in live output.
XLSX route check confirms a valid ZIP/XLSX signature [80, 75].

artifactRefs.description: Live standalone app verification for the dashboard and export routes.
Non-uniform screenshot of the live national-average dashboard.
Command-level verification log for build, live dashboard, export routes, and documentation coverage.

contractCoverage.obligation: The public dashboard renders snapshot-backed national-average data and handles unavailable state honestly.
CSV/XLSX routes export the shared snapshot-backed dataset.
README documents the current install, env, ingest, indicator sync, worker, and export flows.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: embedded-postgres verifier + node .next/standalone/server.js + Playwright screenshot + /export route fetches

adversarialCases.scenario: Live app rendered only after seeding snapshot-backed data in an embedded Postgres verification DB.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Dashboard must depend on seeded snapshot data rather than fabricate missing rows.

adversarialCases.scenario: GET /export/csv against the live standalone app
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Returns CSV containing snapshot and forecast sections from the shared dataset builder.

adversarialCases.scenario: GET /export/xlsx against the live standalone app
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Returns a downloadable XLSX payload with ZIP signature [80, 75].

adversarialCases.scenario: README inspected against current scripts and routes
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Documented commands and routes match the repo's actual current state.

iteration.evidence: G004 implementation was revalidated after export-body and lazy DB loading fixes. The final rerun included full typecheck/build plus a live standalone-app/export verification against an embedded Postgres database.
rerunCommands: node --import tsx --input-type=module embedded-postgres live web verifier
